01-1.description: Banding together for any reason which disrupts unit operations which may include taking over any part of the unit or property of the Department, seizing one or more persons as hostages, or interrupting operations.
01-1.note: May result in loss of all good time

01-3.description: Direct involvement in writing, circulating or signing a petition, letter, or similar declaration that poses a threat to the security of the facility.

17-2.description: Any rule violation set forth above that is found to be related to recruitment or participation in a security threat group, or is motivated by racial, religious, or gender discrimination.
17-2.note: May result in loss of all good time

02-2.description: Under the influence of and/or any use of illegal drugs, alcohol, intoxicating chemicals or any medication in an unauthorized manner.

02-3.description: Monetary Misconduct — Entering into unauthorized contractual agreements, failure to turn in all checks or monies received, obtaining money through fraud or misrepresentation (examples include buying articles on a payment plan, failure to turn in tips received on work release, misleading someone to obtain money).

02-4.description: Employment Misconduct — Work Release inmates who quit a job without prior approval, get fired for misconduct, tardiness or shirking duties, failure to notify ADC staff when too ill to work.

02-5.description: Unauthorized use of mail or telephone, including passing unauthorized messages, three-way communication(s), calling on another's phone code, posing as another person, and telephone communications with unauthorized persons.

02-6.description: Unauthorized communication, contact, or conduct with a visitor or any member of the public or staff.

02-8.description: Running, avoiding, or otherwise resisting apprehension.

02-9.description: Interfering with the taking of count.

02-11.description: Tattooing, piercing, and self-mutilation intended to change oneself or another's appearance; this does not include attempts to commit suicide or injure oneself unless solely for manipulation. See Administration Regulation 834.

02-12.description: Failure to keep one's person or quarters in accordance with regulations, or failure to wear Department-issued ID, or clothing according to center/unit policy.

02-13.description: Breaking into, or causing disruption of, an inmate line or interfering with operations.

02-15.description: Tampering with, or blocking, any lock or locking device.

02-16.description: Refusal to submit to substance abuse testing.

02-17.description: Creating unnecessary noise, including disruptive or aggressive play in areas other than designated recreation areas.

03-3.description: Unexcused absence from work/school assignment or other program activity.

12-1.description: Failure to obey verbal and/or written order(s) of staff.

12-2.description: Refusal of job assignment including participating in a treatment program, boot camp, or class assignment or violating program rules that results in dismissal from a program.

13-2.description: Lying to a staff member, including omissions and providing misinformation.

04-4.description: Battery — Use of physical force upon staff.

04-5.description: Aggravated Battery — Use of a weapon in battery upon another person (not an inmate).
04-5.note: May result in loss of all good time

04-08.description: Battery — Use of physical force upon an inmate.

04-18.description: Aggravated Battery upon inmate — Use of weapon in a battery upon another inmate.
04-18.note: May result in loss of all good time

04-17.description: Throwing or attempting to throw substances, known or unknown, toward or upon another person.
04-17.note: May result in loss of all good time

05-3.description: Assault — Any threat(s) to inflict injury upon another, directly or indirectly, verbally or in writing.

05-4.description: Making sexual threat(s) to another person, directly or indirectly, verbally or in writing.

06-1.category: THEFT, DESTRUCTION OF PROPERTY OR EXTORTION CATEGORY
06-1.description: Demanding/receiving money or favors or anything of value in return for an offer/promise of protection from others of bodily harm, or to keep information secret.

07-1.category: THEFT, DESTRUCTION OF PROPERTY OR EXTORTION CATEGORY

07-2.category: THEFT, DESTRUCTION OF PROPERTY OR EXTORTION CATEGORY
07-2.description: Theft or possession of stolen property.

08-4.category: THEFT, DESTRUCTION OF PROPERTY OR EXTORTION CATEGORY
08-4.description: Destruction or intentional misplacement of property of another or the Department.

08-6.category: THEFT, DESTRUCTION OF PROPERTY OR EXTORTION CATEGORY
08-6.description: Adulteration of any food(s) or drink(s) with intent to harm others.
08-6.note: May result in loss of all good time

08-7.category: THEFT, DESTRUCTION OF PROPERTY OR EXTORTION CATEGORY
08-7.description: Setting a fire or destruction or tampering with fire detection or suppression device.

09-1.description: Possession/introduction of any firearm, ammunition, weapon, fireworks, explosive, unauthorized combustible substance, or unauthorized tool.
09-1.note: May result in loss of all good time

09-3.description: Possession/introduction/manufacture of any drug, narcotic intoxicant, tobacco, chemical, OR drug paraphernalia not prescribed by medical staff.

09-4.description: Possession or movement of money or currency, unless specifically authorized.

09-5.description: Possession/introduction of clothing or property not issued to inmate nor authorized by the center/unit.

09-9.description: Counterfeiting, forging, or unauthorized possession/introduction of any document, article of identification, money, security, or official paper.

09-14.description: Possession/introduction/use of unauthorized electronic device(s), including flash drive, MP player, DVD player, etc.
09-14.note: May result in loss of all good time

09-15.description: Possession/introduction/use of a cell phone or any cell phone component (e.g., sims card, charger, battery, etc.) or an unauthorized messaging device.
09-15.note: May result in loss of all good time and loss of Inmate Telephone System privileges for one (1) year

09-16.description: Use of internet or social media.

14-1.description: Preparing, conducting, or participating in a gambling operation.

10-1.description: Engaging in sexual activity with another consenting person.
